  "description": "Explore voice mode implementation",
  "prompt": "I need to understand the codebase structure for implementing a voice mode feature. Please explore:\n\n1. The UI component structure in apps/ui/src/components/\n2. How features are managed (feature types, API endpoints, services)\n3. The existing hooks and state management patterns\n4. The server API structure for features\n5. Any existing audio/media capabilities\n6. The WebSocket/real-time communication setup\n7. How the AI agent communication works\n\nFocus on finding:\n- Feature management patterns (CRUD operations)\n- How the UI communicates with the server\n- State management approach (Zustand stores)\n- Existing dialog/modal patterns\n- API client usage\n\nBe thorough - this is for a comprehensive specification.",

}

# Voice Mode Feature Specification

## 1. Problem Statement

Users currently need to manually type all their interactions with DMaker, which slows down workflow when managing features, checking statuses, or running tests. A voice interface would allow hands-free, conversational control of the entire feature management lifecycle, enabling faster iteration and a more natural interaction pattern.

## 2. User Story

As a **developer using DMaker**, I want **to converse with an AI assistant using voice commands**, so that **I can manage features, run tests, check statuses, and navigate my project without typing**.

## 3. Acceptance Criteria

### Happy Path
- **GIVEN** I am in the board view, **WHEN** I click the microphone button and speak "list all features", **THEN** the AI transcribes my speech and displays a formatted list of all feature titles
- **GIVEN** voice mode is active, **WHEN** I say "create a new feature called user authentication", **THEN** the feature is created and I receive voice confirmation
- **GIVEN** voice mode is active, **WHEN** I say "run playwright tests for feature 123", **THEN** the tests execute and I receive a spoken status update

### Edge Cases
- **GIVEN** ambient noise is present, **WHEN** I speak a command, **THEN** the system uses noise cancellation and prompts for clarification if confidence is low
- **GIVEN** I'm recording, **WHEN** 30 seconds pass without speech, **THEN** recording auto-stops with a timeout notification
- **GIVEN** I speak an ambiguous command, **WHEN** multiple features match, **THEN** the AI asks for clarification before acting

### Error Handling
- **GIVEN** no microphone is available, **WHEN** I try to start voice mode, **THEN** I see an error message with troubleshooting steps
- **GIVEN** the transcription API fails, **WHEN** I finish recording, **THEN** I see a retry option and the audio is preserved
- **GIVEN** network connectivity is lost, **WHEN** voice mode is active, **THEN** the session gracefully degrades with an offline notification

## 4. Technical Context

| Aspect | Value |
|--------|-------|
| Affected Files | ~30 files across types, server, and UI |
| Dependencies | Web Audio API (browser), Claude API for AI responses |
| Constraints | Must work in both Electron and web modes; streaming required for real-time feedback |
| Patterns to Follow | Zustand stores, WebSocket events, HttpApiClient namespace pattern |

## 5. Non-Goals

- **Real-time voice-to-voice streaming**: Initial implementation uses discrete record → transcribe → respond → synthesize flow
- **Wake word detection**: User must manually initiate voice mode via button/shortcut
- **Multi-language support**: Initial release targets English only
- **Offline transcription**: Requires API connectivity for transcription
- **Voice authentication**: No speaker identification or voice-based auth

## 6. Implementation Tasks

```tasks
## Phase 1: Foundation - Types & Server Infrastructure

- [ ] T001: Create voice types with VoiceSettings, VoiceSession, VoiceEvent interfaces | File: libs/types/src/voice.ts
- [ ] T002: Export voice types from types package index | File: libs/types/src/index.ts
- [ ] T003: Add voice event types to EventType union | File: libs/types/src/event.ts
- [ ] T004: Add voiceSettings to GlobalSettings and ProjectSettings interfaces | File: libs/types/src/settings.ts
- [ ] T005: Create voice service with session management and AI integration | File: apps/server/src/services/voice-service.ts
- [ ] T006: Create voice route handlers (start-session, stop-session, process-command, get-status) | File: apps/server/src/routes/voice/routes/
- [ ] T007: Create voice routes index and register with Express app | File: apps/server/src/routes/voice/index.ts
- [ ] T008: Register voice routes in main server index | File: apps/server/src/index.ts

## Phase 2: AI Voice Scripts & Command Processing

- [ ] T009: Create voice command scripts directory with feature listing script | File: apps/server/src/voice-scripts/list-features.ts
- [ ] T010: Create search features script for description/title searching | File: apps/server/src/voice-scripts/search-features.ts
- [ ] T011: Create check status script for feature status queries | File: apps/server/src/voice-scripts/check-status.ts
- [ ] T012: Create run tests script for Playwright test execution | File: apps/server/src/voice-scripts/run-tests.ts
- [ ] T013: Create feature management scripts (create, update, delete) | File: apps/server/src/voice-scripts/feature-management.ts
- [ ] T014: Create script registry and command dispatcher | File: apps/server/src/voice-scripts/index.ts
- [ ] T015: Create AI command interpreter that routes natural language to scripts | File: apps/server/src/services/voice-command-interpreter.ts

## Phase 3: UI State Management & API Client

- [ ] T016: Add voice state and actions to app-store (voiceSettings, voiceSessionActive, etc.) | File: apps/ui/src/store/app-store.ts
- [ ] T017: Add voice API namespace to HttpApiClient | File: apps/ui/src/lib/http-api-client.ts
- [ ] T018: Create useVoiceMode hook with recording, transcription, and session management | File: apps/ui/src/hooks/use-voice-mode.ts
- [ ] T019: Create useAudioRecorder hook for Web Audio API integration | File: apps/ui/src/hooks/use-audio-recorder.ts
- [ ] T020: Export new voice hooks from hooks index | File: apps/ui/src/hooks/index.ts

## Phase 4: UI Components

- [ ] T021: Create VoiceModeDialog component with conversation interface | File: apps/ui/src/components/dialogs/voice-mode-dialog.tsx
- [ ] T022: Create VoiceButton component for triggering voice mode | File: apps/ui/src/components/ui/voice-button.tsx
- [ ] T023: Create RecordingIndicator component for visual feedback | File: apps/ui/src/components/ui/recording-indicator.tsx
- [ ] T024: Create VoiceTranscript component for displaying conversation | File: apps/ui/src/components/ui/voice-transcript.tsx
- [ ] T025: Create VoiceSettingsSection component for settings view | File: apps/ui/src/components/views/settings-view/voice/voice-settings-section.tsx
- [ ] T026: Export VoiceSettingsSection and add to settings navigation | File: apps/ui/src/components/views/settings-view/config/navigation.ts

## Phase 5: Integration & Polish

- [ ] T027: Add VoiceButton to board-header for global access | File: apps/ui/src/components/views/board-view/board-header.tsx
- [ ] T028: Add keyboard shortcut (Ctrl+Shift+V) for voice mode toggle | File: apps/ui/src/components/ui/keyboard-map.tsx
- [ ] T029: Add voice mode event handling to use-settings-sync hook | File: apps/ui/src/hooks/use-settings-sync.ts
- [ ] T030: Update electron.d.ts with voice API types | File: apps/ui/src/types/electron.d.ts

## Phase 6: Testing

- [ ] T031: Create voice service unit tests | File: apps/server/tests/unit/services/voice-service.test.ts
- [ ] T032: Create voice command interpreter unit tests | File: apps/server/tests/unit/services/voice-command-interpreter.test.ts
- [ ] T033: Create voice route handler unit tests | File: apps/server/tests/unit/routes/voice.test.ts
- [ ] T034: Create voice mode E2E test (mocked audio) | File: apps/ui/tests/voice/voice-mode.spec.ts
```

## 7. Success Metrics

| Metric | Target |
|--------|--------|
| Voice command recognition accuracy | >90% for predefined commands |
| End-to-end response latency | <3 seconds from speech end to AI response |
| Feature listing/search commands | Work without needing additional API calls |
| Playwright test execution via voice | Successfully triggers and reports results |
| Settings persistence | Voice preferences saved and restored across sessions |
| Keyboard shortcut activation | Ctrl+Shift+V toggles voice mode consistently |

## 8. Risks & Mitigations

| Risk | Mitigation |
|------|------------|
| Browser audio API inconsistencies | Use proven AudioWorklet pattern with fallback to deprecated APIs |
| High latency from multiple API roundtrips | Pre-cache common responses; use streaming where possible |
| Token cost from AI interpretation | Voice scripts handle common queries without AI calls |
| Ambient noise affects accuracy | Implement noise gate threshold in recording settings |
| Electron vs Web audio handling differences | Abstract audio capture behind common interface in useAudioRecorder |
| Complex commands may be misinterpreted | Require explicit confirmation for destructive actions (delete, bulk update) |

---
